name: Lattix
description: Distributed agent orchestration dashboard — submit coding tasks to all enrolled machines, monitor node status, and view results. No backend; all data flows through Microsoft Graph to the user's own OneDrive.

capabilities.name: submit_task
capabilities.description: Submit a coding task to all enrolled Lattix machines simultaneously. Requires a prompt (instruction for the coding agent) and optionally a title and agent command override.

capabilities.name: view_tasks
capabilities.description: View all submitted tasks with status indicators, execution results per machine (exit codes, duration, timestamps), and paginated task history.

capabilities.name: view_nodes
capabilities.description: View enrolled machines, their active/inactive status, last activity time, and task execution counts.
